reinforcementResults.name: Contract Lockstep Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: Pass. The workspace includes observable Valkey key/TTL/invalidation behavior (`src/cache_backbone.rs`, `tests/cache_backbone_valkey.rs`), JetStream idempotent consumer flow with retry + DLQ and configured `max_ack_pending` (`src/event_backbone.rs`, `tests/event_backbone_jetstream.rs`), and concurrent SQL stock-decrement coverage preventing oversell (`tests/postgres_runtime_state_persistence.rs`). No API contract-surface change requiring synchronized OpenAPI/TS-client artifacts was identified in this feature diff.

reinforcementResults.name: Cache and Event Correctness Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: Pass for the current feature scope. The workspace implements and wires the cache/event backbone with correctness-first behavior: Valkey key/TTL/write-through invalidation is implemented and observable (`src/cache_backbone.rs`) with focused integration coverage (`tests/cache_backbone_valkey.rs`); JetStream consumer topology config includes `max_ack_pending`, retry (`max_deliver`/`ack_wait`), idempotent dedup, and DLQ routing (`src/event_backbone.rs`, `migrations/20260417090000_cache_event_backbone.up.sql`, `migrations/20260417100000_order_projection_monotonic_guard.up.sql`) with replay/retry/DLQ tests (`tests/event_backbone_jetstream.rs`); DB remains authoritative for correctness-critical transitions via transactional SQL mutation (`FOR UPDATE`) and outbox atomics (`src/persistence.rs`, `src/bin/observability_runtime_service.rs`), and concurrent stock decrement oversell protection is explicitly tested (`tests/postgres_runtime_state_persistence.rs`). DLQ alerting is defined and validated against runtime metric names (`ops/observability/slo/alerts.yaml`, `tests/observability_k8s_slo_baseline.rs`).

reinforcementResults.name: No-Legacy/Fallback Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: Validated against the current workspace code and tests: Valkey cache keys/TTLs/write-through invalidation are implemented and observable (`src/cache_backbone.rs`, `tests/cache_backbone_valkey.rs`), JetStream consumer idempotency/retry/DLQ plus `max_ack_pending` are implemented (`src/event_backbone.rs`, `tests/event_backbone_jetstream.rs`), and concurrent SQL stock decrement oversell protection is covered (`tests/postgres_runtime_state_persistence.rs`). Correctness-critical state transitions remain SQL-authoritative with transactional mutation/outbox paths (`src/persistence.rs`, runtime SQL mutation paths), and the in-memory persistence path is test-only (`#[cfg(test)]`), not a production fallback. I could not execute tests in this environment due read-only sandbox restrictions on Cargo lock/artifact writes, so this verdict is based on implementation and test evidence present in the workspace.

executionConstraints: Keep DB authoritative for correctness-critical transitions.
